name: Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion, celery, and carrot in butter for 10 minutes.
2. Add flour to the sauteed mixture, stirring well; cook 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Combine broth and half-and-half; gradually stir into the vegetable mixture.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. Stir in salt and pepper.
5. Add chopped chicken, stirring well.
6. Pour the chicken mixture into a greased shallow 2-quart casserole.
7. Top with pastry; cut slits to allow steam to escape.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 40 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
